description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a quilted white top surface featuring a subtle geometric pattern. The mattress has a distinct pink edge piping that runs continuously around the perimeter, separating the white top from the beige side panels. The side panels have a textured, woven appearance, suggesting a fabric cover over the mattress core. The mattress appears to be of medium thickness, likely containing layers of foam and possibly inner springs or other support materials. The overall design is clean and modern, with no visible stains, tags, or brand markings. The surface looks soft and slightly cushioned, suitable for sleeping or resting.
description: A rectangular, quilted white mattress with pink edge piping and beige textured sides, featuring a subtle geometric pattern on top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the mattress, highlighting the quilted white top, pink piping, and beige side panel.
description_view_1: Side view displays the mattress's depth and the continuous pink piping along the edge, with the quilted pattern visible on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the quilted white top, pink piping, and beige side, with the geometric pattern extending across the surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the mattress's thickness and the uninterrupted pink piping, with the textured beige side panel clearly visible.
attribute_pattern_design: Quilted geometric pattern with intersecting lines and diamond shapes on the white top surface.
attribute_edge_piping: Continuous pink piping runs around the entire edge of the mattress, moderately thick and made of fabric.
